name: Soft Agar Colony Formation

components.name: 4. Stain with crystal violet or MTT

notes.en: Gold standard for anchorage-independent growth. Noble agar at exactly 42°C. Colony >50 µm scored.
notes.zh: 锚定非依赖性生长金标准。Noble 琼脂精确 42°C。克隆 >50 µm 计数。

ref: Borowicz et al. (2014) J Vis Exp 92:e51998

briefSteps.en: Prepare 0.5% base agar layer in medium → solidify at RT → prepare 0.35% top agar mixed with 5,000–10,000 cells/well → pour over base layer → solidify → culture 2–4 weeks at 37°C with weekly medium overlay → stain with crystal violet or MTT → count colonies >50 µm
briefSteps.zh: 配制 0.5% 底层琼脂（含培养基）→ 室温凝固 → 配制含 5,000–10,000 细胞/孔的 0.35% 顶层琼脂 → 铺于底层上 → 凝固 → 37°C 培养 2–4 周（每周覆盖培养基）→ 结晶紫或 MTT 染色 → 计数 >50 µm 的克隆

detailedSteps.en: Autoclave Noble agar at 1% and 0.7% stock solutions in water; keep molten at 42°C in a water bath; also warm complete medium to 42°C. Work quickly — agar solidifies below 38°C.
detailedSteps.zh: 高压灭菌制备 1% 和 0.7% Noble 琼脂储液（水溶液）；置于 42°C 水浴中保温待用；同时将完全培养基预热至 42°C。动作要快——琼脂在 38°C 以下即凝固。

detailedSteps.en: Prepare base layer: mix equal volumes of 1% agar stock and 2× complete medium to yield 0.5% agar in 1× medium; add 2 mL per well of a 6-well plate; allow to solidify at room temperature for 20–30 min.
detailedSteps.zh: 制备底层：等量混合 1% 琼脂储液和 2× 完全培养基，得到含 1× 培养基的 0.5% 琼脂液；每孔加 2 mL（6 孔板）；室温凝固 20–30 min。

detailedSteps.en: Prepare single-cell suspension at 1–2×10⁴ cells/mL in complete medium (warmed to 37°C); verify single cells under microscope — clumps will form false large colonies.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 37°C 完全培养基制备 1–2×10⁴ 细胞/mL 的单细胞悬液；镜下验证为单细胞——团块会形成假大克隆。

detailedSteps.en: Prepare top layer: mix 0.7% molten agar (42°C) with an equal volume of 2× complete medium containing cells (yielding 0.35% agar with 5,000–10,000 cells/well); mix quickly and add 1.5 mL per well on top of solidified base layer.
detailedSteps.zh: 制备顶层：将 0.7% 融化琼脂（42°C）与等量含细胞的 2× 完全培养基混合（得到 0.35% 琼脂，每孔含 5,000–10,000 细胞）；迅速混匀，每孔加 1.5 mL 铺于已凝固底层上。

detailedSteps.en: Allow top agar to solidify at room temperature for 20–30 min, then transfer to 37°C, 5% CO₂ incubator.
detailedSteps.zh: 顶层琼脂室温凝固 20–30 min，然后转入 37°C、5% CO₂ 培养箱。

detailedSteps.en: Add 0.5 mL complete medium overlay per well twice per week (do not disturb agar); replace medium overlay weekly; monitor colony formation from week 2 onward.
detailedSteps.zh: 每周两次每孔覆盖 0.5 mL 完全培养基（不要扰动琼脂）；每周更换培养基覆盖层；从第 2 周起监测克隆形成。

detailedSteps.en: When colonies reach ≥50 µm (typically 2–4 weeks), stain with 0.5 mL 0.005% crystal violet in PBS or add 500 µL MTT (1 mg/mL in PBS) per well; incubate overnight at 37°C for MTT staining (formazan turns colonies visible purple).
detailedSteps.zh: 克隆达到 ≥50 µm 时（通常 2–4 周），每孔加 0.5 mL 0.005% 结晶紫（PBS）染色；或每孔加 500 µL MTT（PBS 中 1 mg/mL），37°C 过夜孵育（甲臜使克隆变为可见紫色）。

detailedSteps.en: Count colonies ≥50 µm per well using a microscope or colony counter (ImageJ with particle analysis); express results as number of colonies per well normalized to control.
detailedSteps.zh: 用显微镜或克隆计数仪（ImageJ 颗粒分析）计数每孔 ≥50 µm 的克隆；结果以每孔克隆数归一化至对照组表示。

note.en: Cells embedded in soft agar can be maintained at 37°C for 2–4 weeks with regular medium overlays; this is the normal incubation period
note.zh: 细胞嵌入软琼脂后可在 37°C 维持 2–4 周，定期覆盖培养基；这是正常的孵育期

usage.en: Assess anchorage-independent growth as a hallmark of transformation using soft agar colony formation assay.
usage.zh: 软琼脂克隆形成实验评估细胞的锚定非依赖性生长（转化标志）。
